docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POSTANAKEVICH, NIKOLAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PILSK, BERLE $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,438.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR TO BE $2250.00; AND ATTRIBUTES 40% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL -GRANTED, CONTINUED TO 09/23/10 AT 1:30 PM.

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PILSK, BERLE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2010 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,838.44 FILED BY POSTANAKEVICH, NIKOLAY AS TO DEFENDANT PILSK, BERLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-07-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PILSK, BERLE
